document.title: REQUEST FOR APPROVAL - HARNESS WIFI S4335 2G GF

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval documentation for HARNESS WIFI S4335 2G GF, code MI39-02528A, drawing SJ22-06-001, applied to GF DETECTOR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as an approval sheet and supporting inspection, process control, material specification, packing, lot marking, and technical data provision record for GF DETECTOR approval.
keyPoints: The item is listed as HARNESS WIFI S4335 2G GF with code number MI39-02528A and drawing number SJ22-06-001.
Revision history identifies Rev. 00 as INITIAL APPROVAL with date 2022-06-25.
Inspection and control records dated 2022-10-04 reference visual, dimensional, electrical continuity, material, tensile force, and packing controls.
Material specifications include UL Style AWM 2725 and UL 1007 wire specifications with UL, CSA, VW-1, and FT1 references.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal indicates FDA, but the provided source text does not identify FDA or an FDA jurisdiction; authorityOrJurisdiction is left empty.

The source contains multiple dates, including 2022-06-25 revision history, 2022-10-04 approval/request dates, and supplier material dates; documentDate uses the approval/request date most directly tied to this approval sheet.
Some appended material specification pages contain low-quality OCR or garbled text, so only legible standards and specifications were extracted.
The document is an internal/customer approval and supplier technical package, not an explicit regulatory authority approval record.
